quotes.text: Please fix the Tax Harvesting option. It keeps showing the login page of Groww. And even when I try to login in that page, it takes no action.
too much pricing switching to another operator. maket order also they are tkaing price 118 too much for everything. link you adhar 118 lol 😆
Clean interface and beginner-friendly. Investing and trading are super smooth. Perfect platform for both beginners and experienced users.

action_ideas: Evaluate and adjust the fee structure for common transactions to improve competitiveness and user satisfaction.
Resolve critical technical bugs, such as the Tax Harvesting login loop, to ensure feature functionality and reliability.
Optimize the trading experience by clarifying fee breakdowns and streamlining market order processes for better value perception.
